description: A Health Informatics Specialist needs to configure proactive error monitoring for a production ADT (Admit/Discharge/Transfer) message processing channel in NextGen Connect. Using the REST API at https://localhost:8443/api (credentials: admin/admin), create an enabled alert named 'ADT Critical Error Monitor' for the 'ADT_Inbound_Processor' channel. The alert must trigger on SOURCE_CONNECTOR and DESTINATION_CONNECTOR error types using the regex pattern '.*'. Configure an action group for the alert with a subject line containing 'ADT', a template body containing the variable ${error}, and the recipient 'ops-team@hospital.example.org' using the EMAIL protocol. All API requests require the header 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI' and the use of the -k flag for self-signed certificates.
